training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

artifact_usage_claims.usage: preserves official DEG task and initializes target-wise class bias from train split labels only, never val/test

pipeline_program.representation: official K562 AIDO+GNN cached features inherited from root
pipeline_program.target_side: official target genes with train-split-only class-prior bias and learned low-rank factors
pipeline_program.fusion: learned mixture of direct all-target head and target low-rank factor head
pipeline_program.head: target_gene_aware_low_rank_head_with_train_prior_bias
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: target-gene-aware DEG head over source-backed official task; no val/test tuning, no proxy/fallback
